root_cause_identification.expected_solution: The Prometheus response parser in Grafana uses json-iterator/go to parse responses. jsoniter's Iterator methods do not return errors; they set iter.Error. The converter code never checks iter.Error after parsing operations. When the response body is truncated (by dataproxy response_limit) or malformed, jsoniter stops parsing and sets iter.Error, but the converter ignores this and returns whatever partial data was extracted. jsoniter iter.Error is never checked. Truncated JSON from response_limit causes jsoniter to stop mid-parse. Partial data frames are returned as if they were complete. Bug location: pkg/util/converter/prom.go :: Multiple parsing functions in the Prometheus response converter.
evaluation_criteria: Must identify pkg/util/converter/prom.go as the root cause file
Must reference function/method 'Multiple parsing functions in the Prometheus response converter'
Must explain the mechanism: jsoniter iter

error_chain_trace.expected_solution: Error chain: (1) Prometheus HTTP API (web/api/v1/api.go): Returns complete, valid JSON response (2) Grafana data proxy (response_limit setting): Truncates response body if it exceeds configured limit (3) Grafana Prometheus datasource plugin: Passes truncated body to converter (4) Grafana converter (pkg/util/converter/prom.go): BUG: Parses JSON with jsoniter, never checks iter.Error, returns partial data
evaluation_criteria: Must trace the error chain in correct order
Must identify the buggy step at Grafana converter (pkg/util/converter/prom.go)
Must include the entry point (Prometheus HTTP API (web/api/v1/api.go)) and the failing component (Grafana converter (pkg/util/converter/prom.go))

affected_services.expected_solution: Affected components: Grafana Prometheus datasource; Grafana Loki datasource (shares the converter code path); Any Grafana deployment with response_limit configured
evaluation_criteria: Must list at least 3 of the affected components/services
Must cite specific source files (e.g. pkg/util/converter/prom.go)
Must cover both implementation and reference paths (e.g. pkg/util/converter/prom.go, pkg/util/converter/prom_test.go)

remediation_proposal.expected_solution: Check iter.Error after every jsoniter parsing operation in prom.go. When an error is detected (including truncation/EOF errors), return the error instead of partial data. Consider wrapping jsoniter Iterator methods to return errors directly (the PR introduces a jsonitere package for this purpose).
evaluation_criteria: Must propose a fix that addresses the root cause, not just the symptom
Must explain why the proposed fix prevents the failure mode
